metadata.description: Primary location for all resources. Defaults to the managed RG location.
Chat model deployment name, surfaced to the app as FOUNDRY_MODEL.
Optional region override for Azure AI Search (set if the primary region is out of Search capacity). Empty falls back to location.
Entra tenant for backend OBO (optional).
Backend API app client id for OBO (optional).
Backend API app client secret for OBO (optional).
Primary location for all resources.
Tags applied to every resource.
Short unique token to make globally-unique names unique.
Principal granted data-plane roles (the deploying user). Empty skips assignments.
Type of principalId: User for a person (default), ServicePrincipal for CI/CD. ARM rejects a mismatch.
Chat model deployment name (must match the app FOUNDRY_MODEL).
Chat model version for gpt-5-mini (gpt-4.1-mini was retired/deprecating; the gpt-4.x and gpt-4o chat families are no longer GA in eastus2 — only the gpt-5.x family is).

Chat deployment capacity (thousands of TPM). GlobalStandard is pay-per-token, so capacity is just the rate limit — keep it high so agentic retrieval + KB indexing + evals do not throttle. Lower only if you hit a subscription quota cap.
Embedding model used to vectorize the knowledge base corpus.
Embedding model version.

Embedding deployment capacity (thousands of TPM). This caps the KB indexer embedding throughput — at 20 a large re-ingest crawls (~1s/chunk). GlobalStandard is pay-per-token, so raise it freely. Lower only if a subscription quota cap blocks the deploy.
Azure AI Search SKU. Basic is the floor for agentic retrieval (managed identity).
Region for Azure AI Search. Empty falls back to the main location; override if a region is out of Search capacity.
Location for all resources.
Tags applied to every resource.
Short unique token for resource names.
ACR name (login server is <name>.azurecr.io).
Resource id of the shared user-assigned identity.
Client id of the shared user-assigned identity (for DefaultAzureCredential).
Storage account backing the Azure Files share for persisted app data.
Azure Files share mounted into the backend at /app/data (tickets.jsonl).
